node.html: A social onboarding app for connecting with friends. Featuring a smooth onboarding experience, real-time friend discovery, and a polished UI built with modern full-stack technologies. From account creation to first connection in just a few clicks.

Converts live hand-sign video into text using MediaPipe key-point extraction feeding a CNN-LSTM model achieving greater than 94% accuracy. Designed and trained the end-to-end pipeline for real-time inference on streaming video input.

Developed a multilevel thresholding framework for skin cancer lesion segmentation, implementing Kapur's entropy and Otsu's method optimized with advanced meta-heuristic algorithms (EMO, AHO, AHA). Benchmarked across CEC2014–CEC2022 suites with Friedman statistical validation; evaluated using PSNR and fitness convergence metrics.

ML-powered rental price estimator for the Canadian real estate market. Users input province, city, unit type, and amenities — the model returns a predicted monthly rent with high accuracy, trained on a real-world cleaned dataset across major Canadian cities.

Developed crowd density-based decision-making algorithm for optimizing smart room devices, with a focus on minimizing power consumption. Utilized RSSI (Received Signal Strength Indicator) input from smart room setups to estimate crowd density, offering a cost-efficient alternative to video-based solutions.

frontmatter.title: Twitter Bot Detection with Textual and Numeric Feature Set
frontmatter.company: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies

node.html: The project aims to detect Twitter bots to prevent the spread of false information using machine learning algorithms. By analyzing both textual and numeric features, the system labels users as genuine or fake. The project compares various algorithms like KNN, SVM, and Adaboost to determine the most effective approach for bot detection.
